description: Fetch a full Wavedash docs page as Markdown by path or docs.wavedash.com URL. Read-only and unauthenticated.

labels.name: wavedash_get_quickstart
labels.description: Return the Wavedash setup path for a browser game, optionally including an engine and SDK features. Read-only and unauthenticated.

labels.name: wavedash_get_sdk_reference
labels.description: Fetch Wavedash SDK docs for a specific feature such as setup, multiplayer, achievements, leaderboards, cloud saves, UGC, players, events, or types. Read-only and unauthenticated.

labels.name: wavedash_get_publishing_checklist
labels.description: Return Wavedash upload and publishing checklist guidance, optionally including an engine-specific docs page. Read-only and unauthenticated.

labels.name: wavedash_validate_config
labels.description: Validate pasted wavedash.toml text for basic Wavedash CLI config issues. This does not read files; provide the config text as input.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: wavedash_get_doc, wavedash_validate_config · Private data: wavedash_validate_config · Public sink: wavedash_get_agent_workflow, wavedash_search_docs, wavedash_get_publishing_checklist.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: wavedash_get_doc, wavedash_validate_config · Private data: wavedash_validate_config · Public sink: wavedash_get_agent_workflow, wavedash_search_docs, wavedash_get_publishing_checklist

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
